hero.sub: WhatsApp bots that answer, qualify, and book — trained on your tours, your prices, your voice. No leads lost to sleep.

logos.title: Trusted by agencies across Latin America

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything your agency needs to never miss a lead
features.sub: A WhatsApp bot that knows your tours inside out, a live dashboard for your team, and the metrics that prove ROI.

0.title: AI that speaks your brand
0.desc: Train the bot on your specific tours, prices, FAQs, and tone of voice. It answers like your best agent — in Spanish, Portuguese, or English — 24 hours a day.

1.title: Live agent takeover
1.desc: One click to jump into any conversation. The bot pauses, you talk, then hand it back when you're done.

2.title: After-hours capture
2.desc: 60% of WhatsApp inquiries come outside business hours. The bot handles them all — no lead left behind.

3.title: Lead qualification
3.desc: Automatically extract tour interest, group size, dates, and budget from conversations. See your pipeline at a glance.

4.title: ROI dashboard
4.desc: Track leads captured, bookings attributed, and revenue generated — proof your investment is paying off.

how.label: How it works
how.title: Three steps. No tech skills needed.

login.title: Welcome back
login.sub: Log in to your TourGuide dashboard

register.title: Create your account
register.sub: Start your 14-day free trial. No credit card required.
register.name: Full name
register.terms: By signing up you agree to our

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.sub: Enter your email and we’ll send you a reset link.
forgot.sentSub: We sent a password reset link. It may take a minute to arrive — check your spam folder too.

agency.title: Tell us about your agency
agency.description: This helps us customize your bot and dashboard for your region and language.
agency.name: Agency name
agency.tip: Your bot will answer in this language by default. Clients can still write in any language — the bot will detect and respond accordingly.

whatsapp.title: Connect your WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Link your WhatsApp Business number with one click. No technical setup needed.
whatsapp.connectDesc: Sign in with your Facebook account to connect your WhatsApp Business number. The whole process takes less than 2 minutes.
whatsapp.connectedSub: Your number {phone} is ready to receive messages.
whatsapp.disconnect: Disconnect and use a different number
whatsapp.step1Desc: We use Meta's official Embedded Signup — your credentials are handled by Facebook directly, never by us.
whatsapp.step2Desc: Grant permission for TourGuide to send and receive messages on your behalf through Meta Cloud API.
whatsapp.step3Desc: Meta sends a code to your phone to confirm ownership. Once verified, your bot starts working instantly.

tours.title: Add your tours & FAQs
tours.description: This is what your bot will use to answer questions. You can always edit this later.
tours.tourNamePlaceholder: Tour name (e.g. Machu Picchu Full Day)
tours.tourDescPlaceholder: Brief description — what's included, duration, highlights...
tours.faqQuestionPlaceholder: Question clients ask (e.g. Do you offer hotel pickup?)
tours.tip: Don't worry about getting it perfect — you can edit tours and FAQs anytime from your dashboard.

personality.title: Set your bot's personality
personality.description: Choose how your bot talks to customers. This sets the tone for every conversation.
personality.formalDesc: Polished and courteous. Perfect for luxury travel.
personality.formalExample: Good afternoon! Thank you for your interest in our Sacred Valley tour. The price per person is $320 USD, which includes transport, a bilingual guide, and lunch. Shall I check availability for your preferred date?
personality.friendlyDesc: Warm and approachable. Great for most agencies.
personality.friendlyExample: Hey! 👋 Great choice — the Sacred Valley tour is one of our favorites! It's $320 per person and includes everything: transport, guide, and lunch. When were you thinking of going?
personality.casualDesc: Relaxed and fun. Ideal for adventure / backpacker tours.
personality.casualExample: Yo! 🏔️ Sacred Valley is amazing, you're gonna love it! $320 per person, all-inclusive. Just tell me your dates and group size and I'll lock it in for you!
personality.greetingHint: First message when someone contacts you on WhatsApp
personality.greetingPlaceholder: Hi! 👋 I'm the assistant for {agency}. How can I help you?

preview.title: Preview & go live
preview.description: Test your bot below, then launch it when you're ready.
preview.inputPlaceholder: Type a message to test your bot...
preview.greetingFallback: Hi! 👋 I'm the assistant for {agency}. How can I help you?
preview.responseFormal: Thank you for your interest! Our {name} tour is priced at {price} per person. Would you like me to check availability for a specific date?
preview.responseCasual: Nice! 🏔️ The {name} is {price} per person — it's awesome! What dates work for you?
preview.responseFriendly: Great question! 😊 The {name} is {price} per person and includes everything. Want me to check dates for you?
preview.readyTitle: Your bot is ready to go live
preview.readyDesc: Click "Launch my bot" to activate it on your WhatsApp number. You can pause it anytime from the dashboard.

empty.title: Select a conversation
empty.sub: Choose a conversation from the list to view messages and take control from the bot.

chat.takeControlPlaceholder: Take control to send a message...
chat.agentBanner: You are in control — bot is paused

afterHours.title: After hours
afterHours.sub: Conversations handled by bot outside business hours
afterHours.revenueSub: Leads that would have been lost without the bot responding 24/7

hours.title: Business hours
hours.sub: Messages outside these hours are marked as after-hours in your metrics.

bot.title: Bot personality
bot.sub: This prompt defines how your bot responds to customers.

agents.title: Agents
agents.roleHelp: Agents can view and respond to conversations. Admins can also access metrics, settings, and manage other agents.
